changeSet.author: tdd-swarm-team
changeSet.comment:
Fix entity-migration synchronization issue: Rename change_summary to change_description
Root Cause: Migration 0039 created "change_summary" column but MeasureModificationAuditEntity expects "change_description" column (line 77-78 of entity).
Impact: 1 column name mismatch in measure_modification_audit table Related: Entity MeasureModificationAuditEntity.java, migration 0039 (original table creation)
Note: Migration 0039 includes additional audit columns (reason, impact_assessment, ip_address, user_agent, created_at) that are not yet in the entity. These are intentionally kept in the database schema for future feature development and do not affect Hibernate validation.
